archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with soft tactile elements for approachability
design_philosophy: Simple, friendly, clear, not overwhelming. Warm, modern, clean, soft shadows, rounded cards, high readability, comforting not intimidating. Large touch targets, minimal settings, no jargon.

fonts.headings: Nunito, rounded humanist sans for friendly approachability
fonts.body: DM Sans or Work Sans, clean sans for optimal readability

typography.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, inputs, labels. Center-align hero text or success states.

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col bg-[#FDFBF7] shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] md:rounded-3xl md:h-[90vh] md:my-[5vh] md:overflow-hidden relative
general_rules: Fixed bottom action bar for primary wizard actions.
Generous spacing between sections (my-8 or my-12).

buttons.primary: w-full min-h-[56px] rounded-2xl bg-primary text-white text-lg font-bold hover:bg-primary-hover active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm hover:shadow
buttons.secondary: w-full min-h-[56px] rounded-2xl bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 text-slate-700 text-lg font-bold hover:bg-slate-50 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all flex items-center justify-center
buttons.suggestion_chip: px-5 py-3 rounded-full bg-primary-light text-primary font-semibold text-sm hover:bg-primary/20 transition-colors border border-transparent hover:border-primary/30

cards.base: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-[0_4px_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-slate-100
cards.interactive: bg-white rounded-3xl p-5 shadow-sm border-2 border-transparent hover:border-primary/30 cursor-pointer transition-all active:scale-[0.98]
cards.selected: bg-primary-light/30 rounded-3xl p-5 border-2 border-primary ring-4 ring-primary/10

inputs.text: w-full min-h-[56px] rounded-2xl border-2 border-slate-200 bg-slate-50 px-4 py-3 text-base text-slate-800 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:bg-white focus:ring-4 focus:ring-primary/10 transition-all placeholder:text-slate-400

progress_indicator.fill: h-full bg-primary rounded-full transition-all duration-500 ease-out

motion_and_interaction.hover: Subtle lifts (-translate-y-0.5) and soft shadow increases.
motion_and_interaction.wizard_steps: Horizontal slide or crossfade between steps.

media.rules: Use warm, professional, authentic photography. No generic graphics. Maintain organic feel.

sample_upload.usage: Example of an uploaded product photo

generated_ad_1.usage: Option A in the image generation step

generated_ad_2.usage: Option B in the image generation step

generated_ad_3.usage: Option C in the image generation step

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against buttons or primary backgrounds meets WCAG AA 4.5:1 minimum.
accessibility_and_testing.touch: All interactive elements MUST be at least 44x44px (using min-h-[56px] as standard).
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='login-button', data-testid='upload-photo-btn', data-testid='publish-instagram-toggle'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design specifically for a mobile layout (max-w-md mx-auto) mimicking a React Native Expo experience on the web.
Use Lucide-react for simple, friendly icons.
Prioritize large, legible text (Nunito + DM Sans/Work Sans).
Do NOT use raw HTML inputs/selects; use heavily customized Shadcn components matching the organic soft theme.
Ensure bottom action buttons are fixed/sticky at the bottom of the viewport for easy thumb reach.
Use plain, friendly English in all states (empty, loading, error). Avoid technical jargon.
Avoid any purple/violet AI-themed gradients. Keep colors warm, inviting, and comforting.
